project.name: HamaFX-Ai
project.description: Multi-tenant, chat-driven AI trading copilot for forex instruments (XAUUSD, EURUSD, GBPUSD)

nodes.name: analyze_fundamental
nodes.description: Aggregate the upcoming high/medium-impact macro events for a symbol

nodes.name: analyze_technical
nodes.description: Multi-timeframe technical readout (trend, bias, momentum, structure, levels) for a symbol. Use for any

nodes.name: compute_position_health
nodes.description: For each currently-open journal entry, compute live P/L in pips and R-multiples plus distance to stop and target. Use when the user asks

nodes.name: compute_risk
nodes.description: Compute position size, USD risk/reward, and pips-to-stop/target from a (symbol, side, entry, stop, target?, accountUsd, riskPct) tuple. Pure-function — no provider calls. Use when the user asks

nodes.name: convene_committee
nodes.description: Convene a Multi-Agent Trading Committee (Economist, Technician, Risk Manager) to evaluate a trade setup. Use whenever the user asks

nodes.name: get_candles
nodes.description: Fetch OHLC candles for one symbol at one timeframe (e.g. XAUUSD 1h). Use to confirm a recent swing high/low or to feed a pattern read. For RSI/MACD/EMA/etc. prefer get_indicators.

nodes.name: get_correlation
nodes.description: Pearson correlation matrix over close-to-close returns for XAUUSD/EURUSD/GBPUSD at the given timeframe + window, plus a USD-strength proxy (

nodes.name: get_co_t
nodes.description: Last N weeks of CFTC Commitment-of-Traders rows for one symbol (default XAUUSD). Use to answer

nodes.name: get_indicators
nodes.description: Compute indicators (sma, ema, rsi, macd, atr, bollinger, pivots) on a (symbol, timeframe) window. Returns the last 30 points of each series — enough for

nodes.name: get_intermarket
nodes.description: Cross-asset pulse: USD-strength proxy + 24h change, gold

nodes.name: get_portfolio_snapshot
nodes.description: Get a snapshot of the user\

nodes.name: get_price
nodes.description: Fetch the most recent mid price for one or more supported symbols (XAUUSD, EURUSD, GBPUSD). Use only when the LIVE_SNAPSHOT in the system prompt is missing the symbol or older than 10 seconds.

nodes.name: get_seasonality
nodes.description: Per-month / per-weekday / per-hour return seasonality for a symbol. Returns median percent return, IQR, win rate, and sample count per bucket. Use for

nodes.name: get_system_diagnostics
nodes.description: Query the real-time operational health, connection latency, database record volumes, active synchronized files status, remaining daily budget, and verified environment variables in the Copilot system.

nodes.name: log_journal
nodes.description: Record a trade entry in the journal. Returns the new entry id + a summary line. Status is

nodes.name: run_system_action
nodes.description: Trigger the operator-only FRED resonance historical sync. This tool is only for explicit user requests to run the resonance backfill/sync and is unavailable for canned cache or migration theatrics.

nodes.name: set_alert
nodes.description: Create a one-shot price / indicator / candle-close alert. Fires when the rule first matches and then deactivates. The user can resend by editing the alert in /alerts.

nodes.name: summarize_thread
nodes.description: One-paragraph synopsis of the active chat thread plus three durable insights. Use when the user asks

overall_architecture.name: Overall Architecture
overall_architecture.description: High-level package and application relationships. See how monorepo packages, apps, and external providers connect.

feature_map.name: Feature Map
feature_map.description: Feature-to-module mapping showing which files implement which capabilities.

folder_structure.name: Folder Structure
folder_structure.description: Actual filesystem hierarchy of the project.

dependency_graph.name: Dependency Graph
dependency_graph.description: Directed graph of import and call dependencies between all modules.

api_explorer.name: API Explorer
api_explorer.description: All API endpoints organized by domain with their handler relationships.

database_explorer.name: Database Explorer
database_explorer.description: All database tables with foreign key relationships and their schema files.

authentication_flow.name: Authentication Flow
authentication_flow.description: Auth pipeline: middleware → NextAuth → database sessions.

ai_workflow.name: AI Workflow
ai_workflow.description: Chat pipeline: routing → planning → tools → response.

tool_execution.name: Tool Execution Flow
tool_execution.description: All 32 AI tools with their input/output schemas and dependencies.

request_lifecycle.name: Request Lifecycle
request_lifecycle.description: Full HTTP request flow: middleware → route → agent → tools → persistence.

background_jobs.name: Background Jobs
background_jobs.description: Worker daemon: SignalR → tick buffer → candles → cron jobs.

infrastructure.name: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Deployment topology: Vercel + GCE VM + Docker + Supabase.

build_architecture.name: Build Architecture
build_architecture.description: Turborepo build order and package dependencies.

state_management.name: State Management
state_management.description: React state → server state → database state flows.

configuration.name: Configuration
configuration.description: Config files, feature flags, and environment variable locations.

environment_variables.name: Environment Variables
environment_variables.description: All environment variables with their usage locations.
